Apply these instructions when working on architecture, design, and system-structure files.

- Prioritize causal explainability.
- Distinguish clearly between technical, decision, state, memory, values, and educational dependencies.
- Keep Isaac aligned with its long-term vision as a personal, local, trust-based AI core.
- Favor structured documentation over vague feature descriptions.
- Preserve space for future embodiment, situational behavior, and self-development concepts.
